messages.content:
请帮我把以下eNSP代码注释：
<Huawei>sy \\进入系统视图
[Huawei]un in en  
[Huawei]sy SW1 
[SW1]vl b 279 280
[SW1]u t m
[SW1]int g0/0/1
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/1]port link-type access
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/1]port default vlan 279
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/1]q
[SW1]int g0/0/2
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/2]port link-type trunk
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/2]port trunk allow-pass vlan 279 280
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/2]int g0/0/3
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/3]port link-type trunk
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/3]port trunk allow-pass vlan 279 280
[SW1-GigabitEthernet0/0/3]q
[SW1]stp region-configuration
[SW1-mst-region]region-name mst1
[SW1-mst-region]instance 1 vlan 279 280
[SW1-mst-region]instance 2 vlan 281 282
[SW1-mst-region]active region-configuration
[SW1-mst-region]q
[SW1]vl b 281 282

<Huawei>system-view
[Huawei]undo info-center enable
[Huawei]interface Eth-Trunk 1 
[Huawei-Eth-Trunk1]mode lacp-static
[Huawei-Eth-Trunk1]trunkport GigabitEthernet 0/0/2
[Huawei-Eth-Trunk1]trunkport GigabitEthernet 0/0/6
[Huawei-Eth-Trunk1]q
[Huawei]sysname SW5
[SW5]vl b 279 280 281 282
[SW5]u t m

[SW5]stp enable
[SW5]stp mode mstp
[SW5]stp region-configuration
[SW5-mst-region]region-name mst1
[SW5-mst-region]instance 1 vlan 279 280 283
[SW5-mst-region]instance 2 vlan 281 282
[SW5-mst-region]active region-configuration
[SW5-mst-region]stp instance 1 root primary
[SW5]stp instance 2 root secondary

SW5]int g0/0/9
[SW5-GigabitEthernet0/0/9]po l t
[SW5-GigabitEthernet0/0/9]po t a vl 283
[SW5-GigabitEthernet0/0/9]
[SW5-GigabitEthernet0/0/9]interface Vlanif 279
[SW5-Vlanif279]ip address 10.79.79.1 24
[SW5-Vlanif279]int vl 280
[SW5-Vlanif280]ip address 10.79.80.1 24
[SW5-Vlanif280]interface Vlanif 281
[SW5-Vlanif281]ip address 10.79.81.1 24
[SW5-Vlanif281]interface Vlanif 282
[SW5-Vlanif282]ip address 10.79.82.1 24
[SW5-Vlanif282]interface Vlanif 283
[SW5-Vlanif283]ip address 10.79.83.1 24

[SW5]interface Vlanif 279
[SW5-Vlanif279]vrrp vrid 79 virtual-ip 10.79.79.254
[SW5-Vlanif279]vrrp vrid 79 priority 120

[SW5-Vlanif283]dhcp enable
[SW5]int vl 279
[SW5-Vlanif279]dhcp select relay
[SW5-Vlanif279]dhcp relay server-ip 10.79.83.10
[SW5-Vlanif279]dhcp select relay

//设置VLAN 279接口为DHCP中继（relay）模式
[SW5-Vlanif279]dhcp select relay

[SW5-Vlanif282]ospf 1
[SW5-ospf-1]area 1
[SW5-ospf-1-area-0.0.0.1]network 10.79.79.0 0.0.0.255

[AR3]acl 2000
[AR3-acl-basic-2000]rule 5 permit source 10.79.79.0 0.0.0.255

//创建地址组1，并将地址段170.1.79.1到170.1.79.10添加到地址组中
[AR3]nat address-group 1 170.1.79.1 170.1.79.10
[AR3-GigabitEthernet0/0/2]nat outbound 2000  address-group 1

[AR5]dhcp enable
[AR5]ip pool vlan279
[AR5-ip-pool-vlan279]network 10.79.79.0 mask 24
[AR5-ip-pool-vlan279]gateway-list 10.79.79.254
[AR5-ip-pool-vlan279]excluded-ip-address 10.79.79.1 10.79.79.2
<Huawei>telnet 10.79.91.2
这是一个Telnet客户端命令，它的作用是连接到IP地址为10.79.91.2的一个Telnet服务器，您需要在命令后输入用户名和密码来进行身份验证并开始会话。请注意，Telnet是一个不安全的协议，因为用户凭据和通信内容都是明文传输的，建议使用SSH等更加安全的协议。
